snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb

snippet.title: NJIH DVE SVAKI DAN PEЕ KE PREДҗU 15km ZAJEDNO:TeЕЎka Еҫivotna priДҚa devojДҚice Milice i njenog psa Lare
snippet.description:
Nova epizoda serijala вҖһ300 ДҚudaвҖң donela je zanimljive priДҚe o ljubavi i lepoti. Ne kaЕҫu uzalud da je pas najbolji ДҚovekov prijatelj. Ta ljubav je neizmerna, jaka i bezuslovna, a vernost psa ne moЕҫe da se meri ni sa ДҚim.  U KurЕЎumlijskom planinskom selu Konjuva, svakoga jutra pre zore, Milica Rackov (15) kreДҮe peЕЎke put ЕЎkole u susedno selo Barbatovac. Treba peЕЎaДҚiti po mrazu, snegu ili kiЕЎi do autobuske stanice, udaljene nekoliko kilometara od kuДҮe. Autobusom stiЕҫe do ЕЎkole udaljene oko 15 kilometara. Kada se desi da autobusa nema, Milica prepeЕЎaДҚi u oba smera ukupno 30 kilometara. Sve vreme je verno prati i satima ДҚeka keruЕЎa Lara.

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen CvitanoviДҮ iz Golubinje kod ЕҪepДҚa poznat je po tome ЕЎto je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiДҚku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. MeД‘utim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuДҮe, zemljiЕЎta,  ЕЎume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuДҮe i imanja. Danas sadi voДҮe, uzgaja ovce, kokoЕЎi. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloЕҫen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priДҚu koja vas moЕҫe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuДҮe, zemljiЕЎta,  ЕЎume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuДҮe i imanja. Danas sadi voДҮe, uzgaja ovce, kokoЕЎi. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima poloЕҫen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priДҚu koja vas moЕҫe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviДҮ from Golubinja near ЕҪepДҚe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: Danijela Е tajnfeld za Insajder: Htela sam da izbegnem da otkrijem ime, ali je jedna kap prelila ДҚaЕЎu
snippet.description:
вҖңMene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav LeДҚiДҮ, u maju 2012. godine. Posle ДҚetiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u ЕЎoku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmiЕЎljala ЕЎta ДҮe se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanjeвҖң, kaЕҫe u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Е tajnfeld.
Danijela Е tajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde Еҫivi veДҮ godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tuЕҫilaЕЎtvu, a u opЕЎirnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam dogaД‘aj koji se odigrao u maju 2012. 
https://bit.ly/3lJnwRh

Pratite nas na https://insajder.net i na druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama

Razonodite se uz muziДҚko-zabavni sadrЕҫaj domaДҮe produkcije najviЕЎeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naЕЎe produkcije izdvajamo sledeДҮe emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokuЕЎavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Е ta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan StankoviДҮ, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost вҖңjedan na jedanвҖқ razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, вҖңna iglamaвҖқ zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
DrugaДҚija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaДҮe muziДҚke scene. SaznaДҮete ЕЎta drugi sluЕЎaju, ko je i zbog ДҚega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkriДҮete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog Еҫivota izvoД‘aДҚa sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne liДҚnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome priДҚaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica LeЕЎiДҮ i Ljubomir DorontiДҮ.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
GlumaДҚko-voditeljski par NataЕЎa AksentijeviДҮ i Predrag PeД‘a DamnjanoviДҮ vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima priДҚaju o zabavnim sadrЕҫajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim deЕЎavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoДҮ benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamiДҚan i upeДҚatljiv naДҚin.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, BoЕЎko JakovljeviДҮ i Aleksandra JeftanoviДҮ, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji ЕЎou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

snippet.title: Emanet 147. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвҖӢ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAЕҪ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praЕЎkasti sok od jagode (ili rum punДҚa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaДҮi joЕЎ koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliДҚno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunД‘erom skinite peДҚat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ЕЎerpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaЕЎiДҚice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji Еҫelite. NiЕЎta ne meЕЎajte, sok ДҮe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neЕҫniju boju, rozu jaja drЕҫite kraДҮe u soku.

Istresite teДҚnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrЕЎinu da se osuЕЎe, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaЕҫite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

Е to se tiДҚe Еҫutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandЕҫe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirДҮetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moЕҫe bilo koji drugi.

de.title: Malen Sie Eier ohne Chemikalien auf die ursprГјngliche Art und Weise - ganz natГјrlich

Damit das Ei diesen Effekt erzielt, ist es am besten, WeiГҹ zu verwenden. Am Anfang des Videos kГ¶nnen Sie sehen, wie ein gewГ¶hnliches gelbes Ei weiГҹ wird.

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:

AffinchГ© l'uovo abbia questo effetto, ГЁ meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

ar.title: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩ„ЩӮШ© 90 Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ 2
ar.description: ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҲЩ„ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩӮШөШ© "ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ" Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ¬Ш§ШІЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШіШ¬ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ ЩҲЩӮШөШ© "ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш©" Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ЩҠШӯЩғЩ… Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮШ§ ШЁШІШ§ЩҲШ¬ ШӘШ№ЩҠШі Щ…Ш№ ШҙШ®Шө Щ„Ш§ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШЁЩӮЩү Ш§Щ„ШұШ¬Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШӘШӯШЁЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҠШ§Ш© Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№Ш§ Щ„ЩҮ. ШҘЩҶ ШӯШЁ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ШЁШҜШЈ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§ШіШ·ЩҶШЁЩҲЩ„ ЩҠЩғШӘШЁ Ш№Щ„ЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШіЩ„Ш§Щ… Щ„Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠЩҶ ЩҠЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШӘШӯШ¶ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§Ш¬ШҢ ШіЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш§Щ…ШӘШӯШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈШ¶ЩҶШ§. ЩҠШӘЩӮШ§Ш·Ш№ Ш·ШұЩҠЩӮ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩ„ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӯЩҠШҜ Щ„ШЈШӯШҜ ШЈЩҒШұШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҲШ§ШҰЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұЩҠЩӮШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш«ШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§. Щ„ЩҠШі ЩҮЩҶШ§Щғ ШҙЩҠШЎ Щ„ЩҶ ЩҠЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҮ ШҜЩ…ЩҠШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШӯШЁ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШЁШ§ ШЁЩ„Ш§ ЩҮЩҲШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈШ¬Щ„ЩҮШ§. ШҘЩҶ ЩҠЩ„Щ…Ш§ШІ ЩҲ ШІЩ„ЩҠШ®Ш© ШӯШӘЩү ЩҲЩ„ЩҲ ШЈШұШ§ШҜЩҲШ§ ШЈЩҶ ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҙЩҲШ§ ШӯШЁЩҮЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ„ ШҙЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩ„Ш© ЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ№Ш¶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯЩҠШ§ЩҶ ШіЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜШұ Ш№Ш§ШҰЩӮШ§ Щ„ЩҮЩ…Ш§. ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩғШ§ЩҶ ЩӮШҜ ШәЩҠШұ Ш¬ШәШұШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘШҙЩҲЩғЩҲШұЩҲЩҒШ§ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШіШ№Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш№Ш§Щ… 1970 ШҢ ШіЩҠШЁЩӮЩү ШұЩҮЩҠЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШіШ§ШЁШ§ШӘ ШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШәЩ„ЩӮШ© ЩҲ ШӯШұЩҲШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ©.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: Emanet 149. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 149 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Nemamo ni struju ni vodu!
snippet.description:
Svi koji Еҫele pomoДҮi braДҮi SarajliДҮ donacije  mogu uplatiti putem Western uniona na adresu: Mirsada SarajliДҮ, selo Vrhovine, 72250 Vitez, BiH, mobitel:062 726 649 ili na devizni raДҚun u UniCredit banka BiH, PJ Vitez IBAN BA39 3389002558012230, SWIFT: UNCRBA22
BraДҮa SarajliДҮ, Aldin i Sedin nemaju ni struju ni vodu. KuДҮu im je napravila Hayat televizija, odnosno donatori emisije "Ispuni mi Еҫelju". Ovi maloljetnici dobri su uДҚenici a odnedavno su i uknjiЕҫeni na posjed gdje se nalazi kuДҮa tako da mogu traЕҫiti dozvolu za elektriДҚni prikljuДҚak. NajviЕЎe im pomaЕҫe nana Mirsada, inaДҚe penzionerka koja ДҚak odlazi u ЕЎumu skupljati drva kako bi preЕҫivjeli. Aldin i Sedin nemaju mobitel niti kompjutor. Aldin ide na dnevnicu kada ima posla a kada nema, hrani dvije koze koje su dobile i jariДҮe. Ovim djeДҚacima kaЕҫu preДҚe je kupatilo i voda nego struja. ViЕЎe pogledajte u video priДҚi koju smo danas snimili u Vrhovinama kod Viteza.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Milorad TomiДҮ - LoЕЎe je proЕЎao svako ko nije ДҮutao i trpeo Velju Nevolju! (24.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Milorad TomiДҮ ToЕЎa, ДҚovek koji je prkosio momcima s vrelog asfalta. Kao mladiДҮ koji se bavio sportom poДҚeo je da radi na ulazima klubova i tako je upoznao mnoge, gotovo sve, poznate Еҫestoke momke. Svoj posao je obavljao profesionalno bez izuzetka, ne dozvoljavajuДҮi ikome da krЕЎi pravila lokala. Tamo gde je on radio ni najpoznatiji Еҫestoki momci nisu mogli da prave haos. To ga je dovodilo u teЕЎke, a nekada i po Еҫivot opasne situacije. Ipak, tvrdi da ga nikada nije zanimalo ko je ko od tih ljudi, veДҮ samo da li naruЕЎavaju red u objektu. I momci kao ЕЎto su Arkan, Zlatko BagariДҮ, Mihajlo Divac i ostali nailazili su na otpor kada bi se ponaЕЎali neprikladno. Osim u klubovima, ToЕЎa je jedno vreme bio telohranitelj Vojislava Е eЕЎelja i iz tog vremena nosi veliki broj anegdota i uspomena. O svemu ovome govori u svojim knjigama, a i ekskluzivno za gledaoce BALKAN INFO produkcije otvoreno i po prvi put govori o svojoj proЕЎlosti i raznim situacijama koje je doЕҫiveo. PreporuДҚujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 12.03.2021. godine u naЕЎim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar PavkoviДҮ.

snippet.description:

Zadnji dio puzle, tacnije price o 300ks je slozen! Za sada vise nista ne moram raditi, cak ni dizne mjenjati jer su i WRX dovoljno jake za ovaj setup. U rezervi imam i STI i dosta jace od njih, ako se odlucim da ga jos radim. Takodje tu je i pumpa goriva, ali prije toga svega, mora se uraditi motor. Mjenjac je takodje slaba karika, pa cemo vidjeti sta ce dalje biti sa Subiem, jer je trenutno na prodaju. Bacio sam oko na GTR-a, ali ako se to ne ispuni, onda cemo nastaviti raditi na Imprezi.

snippet.title: BOLJE OD Е TRUDLE - ДҢarobna posna pita sa makom, orasima i dzemom koju morate probati
snippet.description:
Verujte mi da joj naziv nije za dzabe "ДҢAROBNA PITA", toliko je ukusna da je meni bolja od ЕЎtrudle a ЕЎtrudlu oboЕҫavam. Kombinacija maka, dzema i oraha u jednom a pritom je joЕЎ i posna. Sigurna sam u to da kada jednom budete napravili ovaj kolaДҚ, recept ide u omiljene i stalno ДҮete ga praviti pa ДҚak i kada nije post. Tako fino, ukusno i meko testo bez jaja i mleka. Ja sam koristila dzem od ЕЎljiva koji se sloЕҫio u ovoj kombinaciji savrЕЎeno. InaДҚe ovo je recept naЕЎe drage blogerke SneЕҫane MarjanoviДҮ sa bloga "IZ_MOJE_KUHINJE"  A evo ga i link gde moЕҫda pronadjete joЕЎ koji recept:
http://snezamarjanovic.blogspot.com/
A moЕҫete zapratiti i SneЕҫin instagram gde objavljuje divne recepte:
https://www.instagram.com/sneza_marjanovic/?hl=en

в—Ҹ SASTOJCI ZA ДҢAROBNU PITUв—Ҹ
250 ml ДҚaja od kamilice (ja sam koristila voДҮni ДҚaj od manga i breskve)
150 ml.ulja
20 gr. kvasca,(pola kocke)
3 kaЕЎike ЕЎeДҮera,
prstohvat soli
1 kesica vanilin ЕЎeДҮera,
narendana korica od limuna,
500 gr braЕЎna Sentella tip 500 za hleb i kolaДҚe
ZA FIL:
300 gr. mlevenog maka,
3 kaЕЎike dЕҫema od ЕЎipuraka ili kajsija,
3 kaЕЎike ЕЎeДҮera,ako je smesa za ЕЎtrudle ne dodavati ЕЎeДҮer,
malo vruДҮe vode.

it.title: MEGLIO DELLA STRUDE - Torta magica con semi di papavero, noci e marmellata
it.description:
Credetemi, il suo nome non ГЁ gratis "MAGIC PIE", ГЁ cosГ¬ delizioso che ГЁ meglio per me dello strudel e io adoro lo strudel. La combinazione di semi di papavero, marmellata e noci in uno e allo stesso tempo risulta anche magra. Sono sicuro che una volta preparata questa torta, la ricetta va ai tuoi preferiti e la farai sempre anche quando non ГЁ a digiuno. CosГ¬ fine, gustoso e soffice impasto senza uova e latte. Ho usato marmellata di prugne che si abbinava perfettamente a questa combinazione.

de.title: BESSER ALS STRUDE - Magische Torte mit Mohn, WalnГјssen und Marmelade
de.description:
Glauben Sie mir, sein Name ist nicht kostenlos "MAGIC PIE", es ist so lecker, dass es fГјr mich besser ist als Strudel und ich liebe Strudel. Die Kombination von Mohn, Marmelade und WalnГјssen in einem und gleichzeitig ist es auch mager. Ich bin mir sicher, sobald Sie diesen Kuchen gemacht haben, geht das Rezept an Ihre Favoriten und Sie werden es die ganze Zeit machen, auch wenn es nicht fastet. sk.title: LEPЕ IE AKO Е TRГҡDA - ДҢarovnГҪ kolГЎДҚ s makom, vlaЕЎskГҪmi orechmi a dЕҫemom

Verte mi, jeho nГЎzov nie je zadarmo вҖһMAGIC PIEвҖң, je takГҪ lahodnГҪ, Еҫe je pre mЕҲa lepЕЎГӯ ako ЕЎtrГәdДҫa a ЕЎtrГәdДҫu zboЕҫЕҲujem. TakЕҫe jemnГ©, chutnГ© a mГӨkkГ© cesto bez vajec a mlieka. PouЕҫila som slivkovГҪ lekvГЎr, ktorГҪ sa k tejto kombinГЎcii dokonale hodil.

es.title: Mejor que el strudel. Un pastel que nos deleitГі a todos con su sabor
es.description:
CrГ©anme, su nombre no es gratis "MAGIC PIE", es tan delicioso que es mejor para mГӯ que el strudel y adoro el strudel. La combinaciГіn de semillas de amapola, mermelada y nueces en uno y al mismo tiempo tambiГ©n es magro. Estoy seguro de que una vez que hagas este pastel, la receta irГЎ a tus favoritos y lo estarГЎs preparando todo el tiempo, incluso cuando no estГ© en ayunas. Masa tan fina, sabrosa y suave sin huevos ni leche. UsГ© mermelada de ciruela que combinaba perfectamente con esta combinaciГіn. 
INGREDIENTES INGREDIENTES DE PIE
250 ml de tГ© de manzanilla (yo usГ© tГ© de mango y melocotГіn)
150 ml de aceite
20 gr. levadura (medio cubo)
3 cucharadas de azГәcar
pizca de sal
1 bolsa de azГәcar de vainilla,
ralladura de limГіn,
500 g de harina Sentella tipo 500 para pan y pasteles
PARA FIL:
300 gr. amapola molida,
3 cucharadas de mermelada de rosa mosqueta o albaricoque,
3 cucharadas de azГәcar, si la mezcla de strudel no agrega azГәcar,
un poco de agua caliente.

ro.title: MAI BINE DUPДӮ STRUD - PlДғcintДғ magicДғ cu seminИӣe de mac, nuci Иҷi gem
ro.description:
Crede-mДғ, numele sДғu nu este gratuit вҖһMAGIC PIEвҖқ, este atГўt de delicios, Г®ncГўt este mai bun pentru mine decГўt strudel Иҷi ador strudel. CombinaИӣia de seminИӣe de mac, gem Иҷi nuci Г®ntr-una Иҷi Г®n acelaИҷi timp este Иҷi slabДғ. Sunt sigur cДғ, odatДғ ce aИӣi fДғcut acest tort, reИӣeta merge la favoritele dvs. Иҷi o veИӣi face tot timpul chiar Иҷi atunci cГўnd nu Иӣine post. Aluat atГўt de fin, gustos Иҷi moale, fДғrДғ ouДғ Иҷi lapte. Am folosit gem de prune care se potrivea perfect cu aceastДғ combinaИӣie.
рҹ”ҠГҺNTREBДӮ TRADUCEREA COMPRIMIND ГҺN COLИҡUL DREPT CC

INGREDIENTE PIELE INGREDIENTE
250 ml ceai de muИҷeИӣel (am folosit ceai din fructe de mango Иҷi piersicДғ)
150 ml ulei
20 gr. drojdie, (o jumДғtate de cub)
3 linguri zahДғr,
vГўrf de cuИӣit de sare
1 sac de zahДғr vanilat,
coaja de lamaie rasa,
500 g fДғinДғ Sentella tip 500 pentru pГўine Иҷi prДғjituri
PENTRU FIL:
300 gr. mac macinat,
3 linguri dulceaИӣДғ de mДғceИҷe sau caise,
3 linguri de zahДғr, dacДғ amestecul de strudel nu adaugДғ zahДғr,
puИӣinДғ apДғ fierbinte.

Koj sum da vidam
Na redot li bev

I vekje nisto ne e bitno

Papa spremni za borba, vleguvam na bitovi,
Gladni sme kako pitovi, veruvaj ne sme pitomi,
Igrava ja pridobiv, i zemav se sto treba, 
Tamu kade sto sum jas, veruvaj vas ne ve gledam !

Tamu podolgo vreme, koj probal pak na tronot da sedne se zaebal pred vreme,
Vi se smeam, 
Zasto trcate po mene, dur ja trcam po nov GL Mercedes da vozam denes !

Definicija za hustla, nagrada mi e i kazna,
Ali mnogu brzo rastam, nema kasa da e prazna,
Gledaj im ja vadam masta, sakaa i da me raspnat, 
ama moze kje me zaprat, ako me staat u sandak !

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңYou really find out whoвҖҷs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.вҖқ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi LovatoвҖҷs new song, вҖңDancing With The DevilвҖқ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

es-419.title: retomando el control : Dancing with the Devil
es-419.description:
"Descubres realmente con quiГ©n puedes contar cuando el mundo se te cae encima".
Demi va a rehabilitaciГіn y comienza a recuperarse, pero se encuentra con obstГЎculos en el camino. Al volver a los escenarios por primera vez desde su sobredosis, necesita encontrar el equilibrio en su vida.
Recursos:

LГӯnea directa de la SAMHSA para personas y familiares que se enfrentan a trastornos de salud mental y/o consumo de sustancias
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

LГӯnea directa nacional para agresiones sexuales
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

O si necesitas apoyo inmediato, contacta por SMS a tu centro de ayuda local:
EE.UU.: EnvГӯa el mensaje HOME al 741741
REINO UNIDO: EnvГӯa el mensaje SHOUT al 85258
CanadГЎ: EnvГӯa el mensaje CONNECT al 686868 o al 741741

Para obtener informaciГіn y recursos sobre salud mental, visita Hope for the Day en hftd.org

Aprende a salvar vidas en endoverdose.net.

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
вҖңKau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.вҖқ
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Saluran siaga Serangan Seksual Nasional
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Atau jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

Untuk pendidikan kesehatan mental dan sumber kunjungi Hope for the Day di hftd.org

Pelajari bagaimana cara menyelamatkan jiwa di endoverdose.net.

pt-BR.title: retomando o controle : Dancing with the Devil
pt-BR.description:
вҖңVocГӘ sГі descobre com quem pode contar quando vocГӘ fica sem chГЈo.вҖқ
Demi entra na clГӯnica de recuperaГ§ГЈo e comeГ§a seu tratamento, enfrentando alguns problemas no caminho. Ao voltar aos palcos pela primeira vez apГіs a overdose, ela precisa encontrar equilГӯbrio em sua vida.вҖқ

Recursos:
 
Atendimento de SAMHSA para indivГӯduos e familiares que enfrentam distГәrbios ligados Г  saГәde mental e/ou por uso de substГўncias.
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Caso necessite de auxГӯlio imediato, entre em contato com suas opГ§Гөes locais de atendimento:
Estados Unidos: Envie HOME para 741741
Reino Unido: Envie SHOUT para 85258
CanadГЎ: Envie CONNECT para 686868 ou 741741
 
Aprenda a salvar vidas em endoverdose.net.

de.title: Die Kontrolle zurГјckgewinnen : Dancing with the Devil
de.description:
вҖңMan erkennt wirklich, wer zu einem steht, wenn einem die Welt unter den FГјГҹen wegbricht.вҖң
Demi macht einen Entzug und beginnt ihren Genesungsweg, allerdings mit Hindernissen. Als sie zum ersten Mal nach ihrer Гңberdosis wieder auf der BГјhne steht, muss sie Balance in ihrem Leben finden.

Hilfsangebote:

Telefonische Anlaufstelle von SAMHSA fГјr Menschen mit psychischen Erkrankungen und/oder SuchtstГ¶rungen und deren AngehГ¶rige
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Anlaufstelle bei sexueller Gewalt
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

Wenn Sie sofortige Hilfe benГ¶tigen, nehmen Sie Angebote zum Krisenbeistand per SMS wahr:
USA: SMS mit HOME an 741741
Vereinigtes KГ¶nigreich: SMS mit SHOUT an 85258
Kanada: SMS mit CONNECT an 686868 oder 741741

FГјr Informationen und Quellen zu psychischer Gesundheit besuchen Sie Hope for the Day auf hftd.org

Lernen Sie, Leben zu retten, auf endoverdose.net.

fr.title: Reprendre le contrГҙle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
"On dГ©couvre ceux qui sont lГ  pour nous quand le monde se dГ©robe sous nos pieds."

Demi va en cure de dГ©sintoxication et emprunte la voie de la guГ©rison, non sans obstacles. Alors qu'elle s'apprГӘte Г  retrouver la scГЁne pour la premiГЁre fois aprГЁs son overdose, elle doit trouver un Г©quilibre dans sa vie.

Ressources :
 
Service SAMHSA pour les individus et proches qui font face Г  des troubles de la santГ© mentale et/ou prise de substances
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Hotline National Sexual Assault
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
En cas de besoin immГ©diat, contactez par SMS votre centre local :
Гүtats-Unis : HOME au 741741
Royaume-Uni : SHOUT au 85258
Canada : CONNECT au 686868 ou 741741
  
Pour en savoir plus sur la santГ© mentale, rendez-vous sur Hope for the Day Г  hftd.org.
 
Apprenez Г  sauver des vies sur endoverdose.net.

en.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
вҖңYou really find out whoвҖҷs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.вҖқ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Pre-order Demi LovatoвҖҷs new album вҖҳDancing With The DevilвҖҰ The Art Of Starting OverвҖҷ https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: PraviДҮete ih stalno! MiriЕЎu do komЕЎija. Banana keksiДҮi za post na vodi, tako mekani i ukusni.
snippet.description:
HIT keksiДҮi kod mene u kuДҮi. UkuДҮani stalno traЕҫe da im pravim. Mogu da stoje par dana, u kutiji kao i svi drugi keksi. UЕҫivajte!
#posnireceptinavodi #posnikolaci #banane
bez ulja
bez jaja bez mleka
sa bananama
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. braЕЎna
- 2 banane
- 3 kaЕЎike dЕҫema
- 100 gr. ЕЎeДҮera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. praЕЎka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 kaЕЎika dЕҫema
- 2 kaЕЎike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes

snippet.title: Son Yaz 14. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ | Evlilik Krizi!
snippet.description:
Son Yaz 14. BГ¶lГјm 1. FragmanДұ | Evlilik Krizi!

Д°dealist Cumhuriyet SavcДұsДұ Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yДұl Г¶nce hapse yolladДұДҹДұ organize suГ§ lideri SelГ§uk TaЕҹkДұnвҖҷdan (Arif PiЕҹkin) reddedemeyeceДҹi bir teklif alДұr. SelГ§uk TaЕҹkДұn, SavcДұ Selim KaraвҖҷnДұn bГјtГјn suГ§ Г¶rgГјtГјnГј Г§Г¶kertecek davasДұnda, tanДұklДұk yapmayДұ istemektedir. Ancak bunun iГ§in tek bir ЕҹartДұ vardДұr; oДҹlu AkgГјn GГ¶kalp TaЕҹkДұnвҖҷДұ (Alperen Duymaz) Selim KaraвҖҷnДұn bizzat korumasДұвҖҰ SuГ§ dГјnyasДұ iГ§inde bГјyГјmГјЕҹ, tehlikeli ve sorunlu gГ¶rГјnГјmГјnГјn ardДұnda duygusal bir genГ§ olan AkgГјn iГ§in bu kabul edilmesi gГјГ§ bir durumdur. Hayat beklemediДҹi bir yerden daha sДұnar SelimвҖҷi; Д°zmirвҖҷde Г§ocuklarДұ ile yaЕҹayan eЕҹi Canan (Funda EryiДҹit) boЕҹanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile iЕҹi arasДұnda kalan SavcДұ Kara, baЕҹ belasДұ olarak gГ¶rdГјДҹГј AkgГјnвҖҷГј ailesinin yanДұna Д°zmir ГҮeЕҹmeвҖҷde bulunan Adalet SitesiвҖҷne gГ¶tГјrmek zorunda kalДұr. SelimвҖҷin beklenmeyen misafiri AkgГјnвҖҷГјn geliЕҹi site sakinlerinin tГјm dengelerini altГјst edecek; EgeвҖҷde baЕҹlayan bu rГјzgГўr, herkesin hayatДұnДұ deДҹiЕҹtirecek bГјyГјk bir fДұrtДұnaya dГ¶nГјЕҹecektir.

OYUNCULAR: ALPEREN DUYMAZ, ALД° ATAY, FUNDA ERYД°ДһД°T, HAFSANUR SANCAKTUTAN, EMRE KARAYEL, SД°NAN TUZCU, ЕһEBNEM DГ–NMEZ, ARД°F PД°ЕһKД°N, SEZER KOГҮ, HALД°L BABГңR, YASEMД°N YAZICI, ERDEM ЕһANLI, YUNUS NARД°N, ATA NEDД°M ARMAN, SARP Д°KД°LER, CENGД°Z OKUYUCU

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major
